description_long: This object is a compact, dark-colored shotgun with a streamlined, utilitarian design. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, exhibiting a worn, slightly reflective black finish with some visible scuff marks and wear. The shotgun features a prominent vertical magazine protruding below the receiver, and a short, cylindrical barrel with a simple front sight. The stock is minimalistic, resembling a pistol grip rather than a traditional full stock, and the trigger guard is rounded and closely fitted to the grip. Several metallic cartridges are visible nearby, suggesting the weapon is magazine-fed and designed for rapid reloading. The overall build is robust, with a focus on functionality and durability, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black, magazine-fed shotgun with a worn metallic finish, pistol grip, and short barrel. The design is utilitarian and robust, with visible cartridges and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the shotgun, the vertical magazine, and the pistol grip clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the alignment of the magazine below the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the other side of the receiver, grip, and the magazine's position.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel pointing away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, compact trigger guard closely fitted to the grip, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
